Container.Name: meshcore-bbs
Container.Overview: A bulletin board system reachable over MeshCore mesh DMs. Provides news, weather, message boards, and user-to-user mail to any MeshCore client.
Container.Description:
A bulletin board system reachable over MeshCore mesh DMs.
Before starting: 1. Find your companion device path: ls -l /dev/serial/by-id/ ESP32 devices (Heltec V3, T-Deck): path contains "CP2102" or "CH9102", maps to ttyUSB0 nRF52840 devices (Heltec T114, RAK4631): path contains "Companion" or "nRF", maps to ttyACM0 2. Edit Extra Parameters: replace REPLACE_ME with the full /dev/serial/by-id/... path 3. Copy config: cp /mnt/user/appdata/meshcore-bbs/config.example.yaml /mnt/user/appdata/meshcore-bbs/config.yaml 4. Edit config.yaml — at minimum set bbs.admin_pubkeys to your MeshCore public key

Config.Name: Health WebUI
Config.Description: Health endpoint (and root metrics if enabled)

Config.Name: Prometheus Metrics
Config.Description: Optional Prometheus scrape port; set metrics.enabled in config.yaml
